name: martin-binance

metadata.name: martin-binance
metadata.summary: Free trading system for Binance SPOT API

documentation:
Profitable, fault-tolerant, adaptable to the market

***

Modified Martingale

Cyclic grid strategy for SPOT market

Free trading system for crypto exchanges:

Binance, Bitfinex, Huobi, OKX, Bybit,

***

martin-binance <--> exchanges-wrapper

***

*** ## Disclaimer All risks and possible losses associated with use of this strategy lie with you. Strongly recommended that you test the strategy in the demo mode before using real bidding. ## Important notices * After update to `3.0.11`, the configuration files `cli_XX_AAABBB.py` for `Binance` trading pairs should be updated. Use templates for reference. * You cannot run multiple pairs with overlapping currencies on the same account! >Valid: (BTC/USDT), (ETH/BUSD), (SOL/LTC) > >Incorrectly: (BTC/USDT), (ETH/USDT), (BTC/ETH) > >As a result of the mutual impact on the operating balance sheet, the liquidity control system will block the work. * Due to a limitation in the implementation of asyncio under **Windows**, this program cannot be executed. [Use with Docker on Windows instead.](https://github.com/DogsTailFarmer/martin-binance/wiki/Quick-start#docker) ## References * Detailed information about use this strategy placed to [wiki](https://github.com/DogsTailFarmer/martin-binance/wiki) * [Trade idea](https://github.com/DogsTailFarmer/martin-binance/wiki/Trade-idea) * [Quick start](https://github.com/DogsTailFarmer/martin-binance/wiki/Quick-start) * [Back testing and parameters optimization](https://github.com/DogsTailFarmer/martin-binance/wiki/Back-testing-and-parameters-optimization) ## Referral link

Create account on [Binance](https://accounts.binance.com/en/register?ref=QCS4OGWR) and get 10% discount on all trading fee Create account on [HUOBI](https://www.huobi.com/en-us/topic/double-reward/?invite_code=9uaw3223) and will get 50 % off trading fees Create account on [Bitfinex](https://www.bitfinex.com/sign-up?refcode=v_4az2nCP) and get 6% rebate fee Create account on [OKEX](https://www.okex.com/join/2607649) and get Mystery Boxes worth up to $10,000 Create account on [Bybit](https://www.bybit.com/invite?ref=9KEW1K) and get exclusive referral rewards Also, you can start strategy on [Hetzner](https://hetzner.cloud/?ref=uFdrF8nsdGMc) cloud VPS only for 4.75 € per month ### Donate *USDT* (TRC20) TU3kagV9kxbjuUmEi6bUym5MTXjeM7Tm8K

methods.name: martin_binance.lib.Orders.find_order
documentation:
Find equal order in_orders[] and self.orders_list[] where in_orders[].id == place_order_id
If exist return order: Order

methods.name: martin_binance.lib.Orders.get
documentation:
Get List of Dict for orders
\:return: \[\]

methods.name: martin_binance.lib.Orders.get_id_list
documentation:
Get List of orders id
\:return: \[\]

methods.name: martin_binance.lib.Orders.get_first
documentation:
Get first order as tuple
\:return: (id, buy, amount, price)

methods.name: martin_binance.lib.Orders.get_last
documentation:
Get last order as tuple
\:return: (id, buy, amount, price)

documentation: Update status defining what happened to the order since the last update.

documentation: Returns the maximally possible sell amount that can be placed at a given price.

methods.name: martin_binance.lib.TradingCapabilityManager.get_minimal_amount_change
documentation: Get the minimal amount change that is possible to use on the exchange.

modules.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT
documentation: !/usr/bin/env python3
-*- coding: utf-8 -*-
Cyclic grid strategy based on martingale
See README.md for detail

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.__contact__
documentation:
##################################################################
Disclaimer

All risks and possible losses associated with use of this strategy lie with you.
Strongly recommended that you test the strategy in the demo mode before using real bidding.
##################################################################
Check and set parameter at the TOP part of script
Verify init message in Strategy output window for no error

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.ID_EXCHANGE
documentation: See ms_cfg.toml Use for collection of statistics *and get client connection*

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.FEE_MAKER
documentation: standard exchange Fee for maker

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.FEE_TAKER
documentation: standard exchange Fee for taker

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.FEE_FIRST
documentation: For example fee in BNB and BNB in pair, and it is base asset

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.FEE_SECOND
documentation: For example fee in BNB and BNB in pair, and it is quote asset

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.SAVE_ASSET
documentation: Save account asset list and value in funds_rate.db

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.GRID_MAX_COUNT
documentation: Maximum counts for placed grid orders

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.START_ON_BUY
documentation: First cycle direction

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.AMOUNT_FIRST
documentation: Deposit for Sale cycle in first currency

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.USE_ALL_FUND
documentation: Use all available fund for initial cycle or alltime for GRID_ONLY

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.AMOUNT_SECOND
documentation: Deposit for Buy cycle in second currency

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.PRICE_SHIFT
documentation: 'No market' shift price in % from current bid/ask price

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.PRICE_LIMIT_RULES
documentation: +-% from last ticker price. Use on Bybit only. 0 - disable

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.PROFIT
documentation: recommended FEE_MAKER*2<PROFIT<=0.85

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.PROFIT_MAX
documentation: If set it is maximum adapted cycle profit, PROFIT<PROFIT_MAX<=1.0

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.OVER_PRICE
documentation: Overlap price in one direction

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.ORDER_Q
documentation: Target grid orders quantity in moment

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.MARTIN
documentation: 5-20, % increments volume of orders in the grid

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.SHIFT_GRID_DELAY
documentation: sec delay for shift grid action

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.STATUS_DELAY
documentation: Minute between sending Tlg message about current status, 0 - disable

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.GRID_ONLY
documentation: Only place grid orders for buy/sell asset

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.LOG_LEVEL
documentation: Default level for console output

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.COLLECT_ASSETS
documentation: Transfer free asset to main account, valid for subaccount only

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.KBB
documentation: k for Bollinger Band

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.LINEAR_GRID_K
documentation: See 'Model of logarithmic grid.ods' for detail

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.ADX_THRESHOLD
documentation: ADX value that indicates a strong trend

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.ADX_PRICE_THRESHOLD
documentation: % Max price drift before release Hold reverse cycle

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.REVERSE_STOP
documentation: Stop after ending reverse cycle

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.MODE
documentation: 'T' - Trade, 'TC' - Trade and Collect, 'S' - Simulate

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.SAVE_DS
documentation: Save session result data (ticker, orders) for compare

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.SAVE_PERIOD
documentation: sec, timetable for save data portion

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.SELF_OPTIMIZATION
documentation: Cyclic self-optimization of parameters, together with MODE == 'TC'

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_2_TESTBTCTESTUSDT.ex.N_TRIALS
documentation: Number of optimization cycles for optuna study in self optimization mode

documentation: Minute between sending Tlg message about current status, 0 - disable

documentation: Only place grid orders for buy/sell asset

documentation: Default level for console output

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_0_BTCUSDT.ex.COLLECT_ASSETS
documentation: Transfer free asset to main account, valid for subaccount only

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_0_BTCUSDT.ex.KBB
documentation: k for Bollinger Band

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_0_BTCUSDT.ex.LINEAR_GRID_K
documentation: See 'Model of logarithmic grid.ods' for detail

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_0_BTCUSDT.ex.ADX_THRESHOLD
documentation: ADX value that indicates a strong trend

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_0_BTCUSDT.ex.ADX_PRICE_THRESHOLD
documentation: % Max price drift before release Hold reverse cycle

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_0_BTCUSDT.ex.REVERSE_STOP
documentation: Stop after ending reverse cycle

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_0_BTCUSDT.ex.MODE
documentation: 'T' - Trade, 'TC' - Trade and Collect, 'S' - Simulate

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_0_BTCUSDT.ex.SAVE_DS
documentation: Save session result data (ticker, orders) for compare

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_0_BTCUSDT.ex.SAVE_PERIOD
documentation: sec, timetable for save data portion

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_0_BTCUSDT.ex.SELF_OPTIMIZATION
documentation: Cyclic self-optimization of parameters, together with MODE == 'TC'

variables.name: martin_binance.templates.cli_0_BTCUSDT.ex.N_TRIALS
documentation: Number of optimization cycles for optuna study in self optimization mode

functions.name: martin_binance.strategy_base.save_to_csv
documentation:
Header: ["TRADE",
         "transaction_time",
         "side",
         "order_id",
         "client_order_id",
         "trade_id",
         "order_quantity",
         "order_price",
         "cumulative_filled_quantity",
         "quote_asset_transacted",
         "last_executed_quantity",
         "last_executed_price",
         ]
        ['TRANSFER',
         "event_time",
         "asset",
         "balance_delta",
         ]
:return:
